<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.0.3 Chrome/140.0.7339.249 Electron/38.7.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.0.3" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="o5huuY4zPCS9nErAyudo"> <mxGraphModel dx="1389" dy="1008" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="850" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" value="" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="140" y="690" width="1110" height="431" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" value="Every node (controller + workers)" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;verticalAlign=top;shadow=1;fillColor=#f9f7ed;strokeColor=#36393d;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="180" y="710" width="610" height="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" value="Pod stdout/stderr
/var/log/pods/..." style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="200" y="759.34" width="265.05" height="100.66" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" value="Promtail
(DaemonSet)" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="550" y="759.34" width="214.29" height="100.66" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" value="Loki
SingleBinary
:3100" style="shape=cylinder3;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=10;strokeWidth=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1050" y="870" width="170" height="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" value="Grafana
NodePort :32000" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="539.05" y="980" width="250.95" height="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" value="User /
Browser" style="ellipse;aspect=fixed;strokeWidth=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="180" y="969.5" width="131" height="131" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" value="" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;rounded=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;endSize=10;startSize=10;startFill=1;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;curved=0;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;" edge="1" source="4" target="5" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" value="POST /loki/api/v1/push" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;endSize=10;startSize=10;startFill=1;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;curved=0;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;" edge="1" source="5" target="6" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" value="LogQL query" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;rounded=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;endSize=10;startSize=10;startFill=1;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;curved=0;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;" edge="1" source="7" target="6" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" value="http://:32000" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;rounded=1;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;endSize=10;startSize=10;startFill=1;edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;curved=0;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;" edge="1" source="8" target="7" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
